ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), NOT(CONTAINS( Account.Name ,'Inactive Contact')), INCLUDES(SupportFunction__c, '§32 KWG|Asset Allocator (DE)'), NOT( ISPICKVAL(Account.BusinessDevelopmentRegion__c, 'BP_DA')) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only Contacts working for German Companies can have this value selected
